scope.summary: Cluster G is fully reconciled: G1-G5 children are already closed in history with explicit source SHAs, and no remaining in-scope children remain open.
out_of_scope: F-D/F-S implementation in code paths outside Cluster G and any open Cluster I work.

limitations: Cluster G is considered complete for code and CI-surface work; remaining items that depend on Cluster G are outside this scope.
